content.en:
The peak cultivation of the fifth realm is the limit of the fifth realm, and the next step is the sixth realm.

However, it was very difficult for the fifth realm to break through to the sixth realm, and countless fifth realms could not break through to the sixth realm.

If the fifth realm wants to break through to the sixth realm, one of the most basic requirements is that the soul will must step into the eleventh dimension, and the minimum dimension rule realm must also have five dimensional rules.

Of course, the higher the realm of dimensional rules, the higher the probability of breakthrough, and if you comprehend the sevenfold dimensional rules, then the probability of breaking through is almost 100%.

However, if the fifth realm wants to break through to the sixth realm, the real difficulty is not like this.

If the dimensional rules and soul will want to be improved, relying on the endless long years, there is still hope, but there are still countless fifth realms that cannot be broken through, and the real difficulty lies in the dimensional void in the body.

If the fifth realm wants to break through to the sixth realm, it is necessary to let the dimensional void in the body be voided into reality, which can truly trigger a transformation, so as to break the shackles and advance to the sixth realm.

This step has blocked countless Fifth Realms, and even if the Sixth Realm is allowed to break through again, it may not be possible to break through.

If you want to make the dimensional void to be virtualized, there are basically two ways.

The first method is to intercept a fragment of the true dimension of the eleventh dimension, so as to integrate it into the body, so that the dimensional void can be completely transformed into a reality.

However, how rare it is to have 690 pieces of true dimension fragments in the eleventh dimension, this requires a terrifying battle to break out in the eleventh dimension, and the corner of the eleventh dimension is shattered, so as to give birth to a little fragment, and this fragment must be obtained, which can be imagined to be very difficult.

The second way is to find resources that can make the dimensional void in the body void to void reality, and during the multidimensional tribulation of death, this kind of treasure may be born.

In the last Death Multidimensional Tribulation, a Sixth Realm was born, and it was this resource that was found, so that the dimensional void in the body could be transformed into reality.

But Ye Tian also learned a breakthrough method from the mouth of the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Gate Pagoda Spirit.

That is to comprehend the dimensional rules to the ninth level, as long as the ninth dimensional rules are comprehended, the dimensional void in the body will automatically evolve, and the virtual reality will be transformed, so as to easily break through to the sixth realm.

But this method was almost abandoned, because if the Fifth Realm wanted to comprehend the rules of the Nine Dimensions, it was almost impossible!

However, comprehending the rules of the ninefold dimension is the truly perfect way to break through, and what resources and treasures are used, and the fragments of the eleventh dimension are all forcibly broken through with the help of external objects.

"Maybe I still have the hope of comprehending the rules of the ninefold dimension, but I still have to comprehend the rules of the sevenfold dimension first, and then create the Five Realms Supreme Peerless Learning, so that my strength will far surpass the ordinary Sixth Realm. "

Ye Tian muttered.

With the powerful combat power of the sixth realm, he can completely protect the human race and survive the multi-dimensional tribulation of death, so that he has enough time to slowly comprehend the rules of the dimension, otherwise he will not want to comprehend the rules of the ninefold dimension.

......

Time passes.

In a flash, tens of millions of extradimensional epochs have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian finally comprehended the rules of the sevenfold dimension, and an incomparably powerful aura erupted from his body, and his combat power increased again.

Now, his combat power has surpassed that of the Heavenly Dimension Realm Lord, and it is not more than a little bit.

Seven dimensional rules, who in the fifth realm can do it?

No one in the Four Thousand Territory can do it, but there may be someone in the Fifth Realm in the Upper Domain who can do it.

After comprehending the rules of the sevenfold dimension, Ye Tian tried to create his own Five Realms Supreme Learning, and he urged the Ten Pivot Golden Plate and the multi-dimensional wisdom light to analyze and create his own Five Realms Supreme Learning.

Fortunately, he has the inheritance of the Five Realms Supreme Absolute Sect of the Sixth Realm, and he does not need to create it from scratch, he can completely absorb the essence of the other party's Five Realms Supreme Absolute Learning, and constantly imitate it, so as to create a Five Realms Supreme Absolute Sect that belongs to himself (cibj).

This method is the fastest, but the Five Realms Supreme Absolute Sect created is definitely not the top, but as long as he reaches the Five Realms Supreme Absolute Absolute Skill standard, he can skyrocket his strength significantly.

At the same time, one of Ye Tian's replica bodies was still trying to use the power of death to enhance the ordinary innate multi-dimensional treasure of the Ten Pivot Golden Plate.

He wanted to raise the level of the Ten Pivot Gold Plate, and if it was raised to the first, second, and third tribulations, its effect would definitely skyrocket.

Under normal circumstances, the time of a death multi-dimensional tribulation can hope to elevate an innate multi-dimensional treasure to a tribulation, and the higher the level, the more difficult it is.

For example, the Innate Multidimensional Arcana after the Three Tribulations may take several or even ten Multidimensional Tribulations before it can be promoted.

But now is the period of the Death Multidimensional Tribulation, and the death tribulation power of the Death Multidimensional Tribulation far exceeds the power of other multidimensional tribulations, and it can definitely make the Innate Multidimensional Treasure advance faster.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian also created a secret technique to help the innate multi-dimensional treasure advance, and then used this secret method to refine the Ten Pivot Gold Plate all the time.

Sure enough, it didn't take much time for the Ten Pivot Gold Plate to completely advance to the level of a tribulation.

After that, he continued to help the Ten Pivot Golden Plate advance, but it was difficult to promote from one calamity to two calamities, and he couldn't do it in a short period of time, at least tens of millions of extradimensional epochs were needed.

In a flash, it was tens of millions of extradimensional era time, and the Ten Pivot Golden Disk successfully advanced to the level of the Second Tribulation.

At this time, the Ten Pivot Golden Plate has far exceeded the past, and the effect of analyzing the rules of the Enlightenment Dimension is very good, which can naturally help to better create the Five Realms Supreme Peerless Learning.

And after such a long time of creation, Ye Tian is also about to create the Five Realms Supreme Peerless Learning.

Another 10 million extradimensional epochs have passed.

this day.

"Broken!"

A terrifying sword shattered the tenth dimensional void, shattering pieces of dimensional fragments.

It's a pity that these dimensional fragments are dimensional fragments of the tenth dimension, not dimensional fragments of the eleventh dimension.

For Ye Tian, these dimensional fragments were of little use, but they were of great use to the fourth realm, which could help the fourth realm to assist in breaking through the fifth realm, so that the extradimensional realm in his body could be transformed into a dimensional void.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian put away these tenth dimensional dimensional fragments and put them in the Terran Treasure House, if anyone wanted to rely on it to break through to the fifth realm, he would naturally let him break through.

But such a breakthrough will undoubtedly cut off the hope of future advancement, and there is no hope for the sixth realm.

Of course, many people only want to advance to the fifth realm, and they don't have hope for the sixth realm.

"This Five Realms is the strongest master, so let's name it Sword Eleven!"

Ye Tian took a name.

For him, the name doesn't matter, the strength is the most important thing.
